rationale: Multiple duplicate issues created for the same JML Mover automation flow feature. Issues #53, #55, and #57 all describe identical implementation scope. Consolidating to most recent issue #57.

evidence.primary_issue_reason: Most recent, has Linear link HAR-12, most complete description

NIST_800_53.CM-3: Configuration Change Control - Deduplication maintains clear change tracking
NIST_800_53.AC-2: Account Management - JML Mover affects user lifecycle management

SOC2.CC6.1: Logical Access Controls - User role change automation
SOC2.CC6.2: Prior to Issuing System Credentials - Access management lifecycle

ISO27001.A.9.2.1: User Registration and De-registration - Mover flow part of lifecycle
ISO27001.A.9.2.6: Removal or Adjustment of Access Rights - Primary function of Mover

closure_reason: Duplicate issues. Consolidating to #57 as primary tracking issue. Sub-issues #58 and #59 remain linked to #57.
risk_assessment: NONE - Deduplication improves clarity, no functionality impact
